---
name: Report an unassessable criterion
about: Report that a criterion cannot be assessed as written
title: "[UNASSESSABLE] "
labels: unassessable
---

## Criterion

_(e.g. `AGENT-02`)_

## Context

_(In what assessment did this arise? Practitioner / Product / Organization? Which rubric version?)_

## What went wrong

_(Describe why the criterion could not be assessed. Distinguish:)_

- [ ] The evidence required by the criterion cannot be produced in principle (not merely by this team).
- [ ] The criterion's wording is ambiguous enough that two reasonable assessors would arrive at different scores.
- [ ] The criterion's evidence requirements are stated but no method exists to inspect them.
- [ ] Other _(describe)_.

## What score was recorded

_(How did you score the criterion in the report, given the difficulty?)_

## Suggested fix

_(Optional. Wording change, added guidance in `assessment/method.md`, or something else.)_

---

Unassessable criteria are treated as maintenance defects and prioritized. See [`GOVERNANCE.md`](../../GOVERNANCE.md).
